title: WynnCompare
description: Side-by-side tooltip comparison for Wynncraft equipment
body:
# WynnCompare

A client-side Fabric mod that adds equipment tooltip comparison for [Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com).

## Features

### Equipped Tooltip (Hold C)
See your currently equipped item's full tooltip alongside the one you're hovering over. When multiple items match (e.g., two rings), all are shown side-by-side with indicators like **Equipped (1/2)**.

![equipped weapon tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de2fc30c69c67fedfa6711039b4470e069f34a2d.png)
![equipped armor tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14db0deee1562d66cade1c6c6222094b7ff627c7.png)


### Stat Comparison (Hold X)
Get a stat-by-stat breakdown comparing the hovered item against your equipped gear. 

If the two items share the same stats you can see the difference highlighted in different colors:
- **Green** for improvements
- **Red** for downgrades
- **Gray** for no change
- **Yellow** for mixed results (range stats)

Stats that are not on the hovered item are shown in gray.

![detailed comparison on weapon tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb1e267590116a0f6ec53c0ed991d99a092ae80b.png)
![detailed comparison on armor tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c80c42b4eac8c374142f4cbe3ea8d14db5dd3c9.png)

Compared stats include:
- Health, Defence, Damage (including ranges)
- Attack Speed (with tier difference, e.g. `+2`)
- Attributes (Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, Agility, Defence)
- All other stats (XP Bonus, Mana Regen, etc.)
- Abilities (shown as `+AbilityName`)

### Smart Positioning
Tooltips are displayed to the left of the cursor and automatically clamped to stay within screen bounds.

### Configurable Keybindings
Both keys can be rebound in **Options > Controls > Key Binds** under the **WynnCompare** category.

| Action | Default Key |
|---|---|
| Show Equipped Tooltip | `C` |
| Show Stat Comparison | `X` |

When both keys are held, the comparison tooltip takes priority.

## Supported Equipment

- Armor (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots)
- Weapons (Bow, Dagger, Wand, Spear, Relik)
- Accessories (Ring, Bracelet, Necklace)
